title: Collective money purchase: registration of unconnected multiple employer schemes
body: "This measure will treat unconnected, multiple-employer collective money purchase schemes as occupational pension schemes. This will allow them to apply to HMRC to become a registered pension scheme and operate as intended.  It will also allow HMRC to refuse to register or deregister a collective money purchase  scheme that has not been authorised by the Pensions Regulator.  The measure will provide HMRC with the power to make regulations to efficiently support the development of collective money purchase schemes. "
